issue.title: [web] Split auth-dependent rendering from public pages and harden PWA
issue.goal: Move auth-dependent rendering out of public routes, avoid request-time rendering where not needed, and harden the service worker and PWA asset handling.
acceptanceCriteria: Public routes are not forced into request-time rendering by auth-only cookie reads unless that tradeoff is intentional.
Public detail pages provide the expected server metadata.
Service worker or PWA URL handling only opens allowed destinations and references correct icons/assets.

description: The current frontend mixes auth-dependent rendering into public surfaces and lets the service worker open unvetted URLs. Split those concerns and harden the PWA flow so public pages stay fast and predictable.
